codeReview.summary: The fix cleanly closes the reviewed cache invalidation regression. `CompanyContextFilter` now treats canonical `PUT /api/v1/companies/{id}/tenant-runtime/policy` requests as tracked policy-control operations for authorized super-admins, and `TenantRuntimeEnforcementService.updatePolicy(...)` persists the refreshed state, quotas, audit chain, and timestamp before successful policy-control completion invalidates the in-memory cache. The added integration, service, and truth-suite coverage demonstrates both halves of the fix: canonical company-scoped policy updates are tracked, and a warmed same-node request is denied immediately after the canonical update blocks the tenant.

summary: PASS. Canonical company-scoped tenant-runtime policy updates now invalidate the same-node cache immediately after persisting the new policy, and the regression coverage directly exercises the reviewed failure mode.
